Hero.title: Hello
Hero.subtitle: I'm Vladyslav and I'm a DevOps Engineer

About.title: About me
About.text: DevOps Engineer with expertise in cloud-native architectures, containerization, and production system reliability. Experienced in building automated monitoring solutions, implementing GitOps workflows, and ensuring service reliability at scale. Strong foundation in software development with focus on infrastructure as code and operational excellence.

description.1: Optimized application performance, reducing load times by 60%
description.2: Implemented automated testing and CI/CD pipelines for streamlined deployment with zero-downtime releases
description.3: Achieved 99% uptime through automated monitoring and deployment pipelines
description.4: Participated in code reviews and on-call rotation to ensure code quality, system reliability, and rapid incident response

description.1: Designed and implemented a comprehensive observability stack using Prometheus and Grafana for automated alerting and incident response
description.2: Automated infrastructure provisioning using Infrastructure as Code principles, reducing deployment time by 40%
description.3: Implemented GitOps workflows with FluxCD/ArgoCD for reliable, auditable deployments
description.4: Collaborated with team members to implement best practices for container orchestration

description.1: Worked within an agile development team to deliver project milestones
description.2: Implemented infrastructure components using Firebase and Algolia
description.3: Gained hands-on experience with deployment automation and monitoring

heyhomie-helm.title: heyhomie-helm
heyhomie-helm.description: This repository centralizes Helm charts for deploying and managing the various services that make up the HeyHomie application. The stack includes multiple frontends, backends, and infrastructure components deployed on Kubernetes with GitOps principles.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: A modern, fully-responsive portfolio website built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features dark/light theme support, multi-language localization (EN/PL), and smooth animations.
